title: Chief Judge and Judges not to be engaged in any other office and provisions relating to transfer

content.text: No Chief Judge or Judge of a High Court shall be engaged in or deputed to any office other than that of Judge. Provided that the Government of Nepal may, in consultation with the Judicial Council, depute a Judge of the High Court to work concerning judicial inquiry, or to legal or judicial investigation or research or to any business of national concern for any specific period.
The Chief Justice may, on recommendation of the Judicial Council, transfer a Judge of a High Court to another High Court.
